name: /EODATA/CLMS/land_cover_use_in_priority_areas/urban_atlas/clms_ua_street-tree-layer_europe_V005ha_3yearly_v1/2021
browserSearchPath: CLMS Land Cover & Use in Priority Areas/Urban Atlas/Street Tree Layer
collectionDescription: Urban Atlas Street Tree Layer 2021 provides information about presence of trees within Functional Urban Areas (FUA).

layers.longDescription: Provides a separate layer of Urban Atlas 2021 showing contiguous rows or patches of trees covering 500 m² or more and with a Minimum Mapping Width (MMW) of 10 m over "Artificial surfaces" (nomenclature class 1) inside each Functional Urban Area (FUA). The dataset is available as vector data.
Provides the Urban Atlas 2021 urban mask for the Street Tree Layer.
